acmpca.certificate.subject.CfnAbout: Contains information about the certificate subject. The `Subject` field in the certificate identifies the entity that owns or controls the public key in the certificate. The entity can be a user, computer, device, or service. The `Subject `must contain an X.500 distinguished name (DN). A DN is a sequence of relative distinguished names (RDNs). The RDNs are separated by commas in the certificate.

acmpca.certificate.subject.CommonName.Description: For CA and end-entity certificates in a private PKI, the common name (CN) can be any string within the length limit.  Note: In publicly trusted certificates, the common name must be a fully qualified domain name (FQDN) associated with the certificate subject.

acmpca.certificate.subject.Country.Description: Two-digit code that specifies the country in which the certificate subject located.

acmpca.certificate.subject.CustomAttribu.Description: Contains a sequence of one or more X.500 relative distinguished names (RDNs), each of which consists of an object identifier (OID) and a value. For more information, see NIST’s definition of [Object Identifier (OID)](https://csrc.nist.gov/glossary/term/Object_Identifier).  Custom attributes cannot be used in combination with standard attributes.

acmpca.certificate.subject.Distinguished.Description: Disambiguating information for the certificate subject.

acmpca.certificate.subject.GenerationQua.Description: Typically a qualifier appended to the name of an individual. Examples include Jr. for junior, Sr. for senior, and III for third.

acmpca.certificate.subject.Initials.Description: Concatenation that typically contains the first letter of the **GivenName**, the first letter of the middle name if one exists, and the first letter of the **Surname**.

acmpca.certificate.subject.Locality.Description: The locality (such as a city or town) in which the certificate subject is located.

acmpca.certificate.subject.Organization.Description: Legal name of the organization with which the certificate subject is affiliated.

acmpca.certificate.subject.Organizationa.Description: A subdivision or unit of the organization (such as sales or finance) with which the certificate subject is affiliated.

acmpca.certificate.subject.Pseudonym.Description: Typically a shortened version of a longer **GivenName**. For example, Jonathan is often shortened to John. Elizabeth is often shortened to Beth, Liz, or Eliza.

acmpca.certificate.subject.State.Description: State in which the subject of the certificate is located.

acmpca.certificate.subject.Surname.Description: Family name. In the US and the UK, for example, the surname of an individual is ordered last. In Asian cultures the surname is typically ordered first.

acmpca.certificate.subject.Title.Description: A title such as Mr. or Ms., which is pre-pended to the name to refer formally to the certificate subject.
